content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Basketball Exercise". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1195/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of points. Then n lines follow, each containing two integers xi and yi, the coordinates of the i-th point.
content.outputFormat: Output the maximum number of points that lie on the same line.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Calculate the slope of the line passing through each pair of points and store the count of each slope in a hashmap.
